{{CargoRelic
|name=Famous Mountains Guide
|class_id=20930
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This guidebook compiles information on famous mountains from around the world, including their heights, local customs, and natural landscapes. It is a product of collaboration between multiple professional mountaineering teams, designed specifically for climbing enthusiasts, and is a must-read for travelers.
|fame=32
|art=15
|fth=14
|civ=15
|tech=14
|ss1=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail DEF +2<br>Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail RUSH +2<br>Quarry LVL: 90/90
|ss2=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail DEF +4<br>Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail RUSH +4<br>Quarry LVL: 90/90
|ss3=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail DEF +6<br>Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Quarry LVL: 90/90
|ss4=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail DEF +6<br>Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Quarry LVL: 90/90
|ss7=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail DEF +6<br>Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Quarry LVL: 90/90<br> (Awakened)
}}
